prose:
Property: atom-resolved Fukui reactivity indices (f⁺ electrophilic attack, f⁻ nucleophilic attack, dual descriptor) for pyridine.

Level of theory: DFT, tier ‘standard’ (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF.  
Geometry provenance: fixed coordinates from the supplied XYZ file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz); no further optimisation — the DFT single-point and N ± 1 charge-state calculations were performed directly on this geometry (DFT//input-XYZ).  
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).  
Charge / Multiplicity: neutral singlet (0, 1) for the reference, doublets for the ±1 charge states.  
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (backend PySCF).  
Convergence: all three SCFs reached convergence; chemkit returned integrity status “ok”.
